prompt: My Flask app with Gunicorn is running on port 5000, but POST /api/users returns 403 Forbidden even though I'm admin. The app works locally. What's broken?
expected_output: Point to CSRF token requirement (line 316 in Common Failures). Show: (1) curl -s -H 'X-CSRFToken: <token>' (if CSRF is enabled), or (2) check if the POST handler requires a specific header (Authorization, Content-Type). Validate by inspecting actual 403 response body with curl -i, not just the status.
